---
name: 🔌 MCP Server Request
about: Request a new Model Context Protocol (MCP) server integration
title: '[MCP] '
labels: mcp-integration
assignees: ''
---

**MCP Server Name**
Name of the service/tool you want to integrate (e.g. SQLite, GitHub, Linear, Slack).

**Link to existing MCP Implementation (if any)**
Is there an existing open-source MCP server implementation we can pull? (e.g., https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers)

**Why should this be integrated by default?**
Describe how this MCP server enhances the core capabilities of AgentForge agents (e.g., permits agents to read database records, create tickets, etc.).

**Configuration Requirements**
What environment variables or configuration blocks are required to run this server? (e.g., API tokens, DB files, auth credentials)

**Security Implications**
What read/write access permissions are required by this server? Is it safe for local runtime?
